summary:
Both projects maintain rigorous, pre-registered experiment ledgers with explicit kill lists, and both have run cross-imports of each other's alpha with mostly-negative results. FableMultiAssets2 (v3.4 final: 8 sleeves @ GLOBAL_SCALE 10, 1m single-account engine, worst-mark DD, CAGR 88.7%/DD 21.7%/Sharpe 1.85/0 negY/1 negQ/breach 0.121, €10k→€449,708, config hash 48c09199fbf83d82) killed 5 of 12 sleeve families on DEV/HOLD evidence (trend, xsec_fx, session_flow, lead_lag, statarb), rejected every risk-overlay it tried (dd_throttle, quarter_throttle, correlation-spike de-gross, gold trim), killed 3 of 4 external ports from NewStrategyFable5 on a clean 2015-19 pre-period (S6_OPEXUSD −0.32, VOLSTRUCT −0.64, F1 corr-bar+H2H loss) adopting only MAG_XAU@0.05, DECLINED trend_v2 removal (v3.1, 1/5 bars — trend_v2 SURVIVES as a tail drawdown-diversifier), DECLINED xsec_reversion@0.03 (v3.3, conditional chop insurance — 2018-19 Sharpe −0.54), ACCEPTED maker-first execution config-only/demo-gated (v3.2), and ADOPTED scale 10 (v3.4) after declining scales 12 and (effectively) 11.

NewStrategyFable5 (V7.0 final: 7-sleeve band book BAND_SYM_25 @ R10; MT5 real-tick 96.1% CAGR/20.9% Max eqDD/35.6% Relative eqDD/Sharpe 2.03/3 negQ; Python panel 108.5%/18.84%/2.426/€956,197) has a much larger graveyard: ~22 early probes, ~50 round-2 concepts, the entire V4-era tuning/diversification/risk-management/discovery searches (all null — three independent "frontier" walls), the V5 silver mirage, and five straight V7/V8-era closures: debounce-3 (panel +1.4pp but tick −6.6pp → schedule levers banned without tick proof), the V7.3/V7.5 overlay ring (real +6.9pp panel value but blocked by single-account rebalance chaos, and V7.5 proved the overlay is CAGR-NEGATIVE above ~44-47% forward core CAGR → insurance only, m=0 legitimate), V7.4 VIX tail hedge (both always-on and term-structure-conditional FAIL the ≥5pp COVID DD-cut bar; V7.4 CLOSED), V7.6 energy carrier (0/15 tsmom cells; XBRUSD:L20 is a one-event 2020 mirage carrying 78.8% of P&L; KEEP S6), and V8.1 intraday give-back interceptor (NULL_CONFIRMED, −6.6 to −15.5pp every cell). The V8 re-lever study additionally killed crisis/seasonal insurance on the band book (retired the H14 +5.57pp as cadence-conditional), killed profit-ring-fence/HWM-delever (0/29 dominate R10), and showed straight re-lever is tick-saturating (+3.7pp R10→R12 at ~1:1 tail cost) — recommendation: ship R10/m=0 unchanged.

The two cross-import gauntlets are the decisive merger guidance. Direction NSF5→FMA2 (v3.0, docs/v3.0/RECON.md — read-firewall lifted only for the import): 4 frozen ports (S6_OPEXUSD, MAG_XAU, VOLSTRUCT vs2_m2nh, F1 USTEC opening-drive) run through 3 pre-registered stages; only MAG_XAU survived (Stage-2 Sharpe 0.62 on 2015-19); the band/H8 rebalance mechanism was ruled NOT IMPORTABLE (its premium is a slot-equity-sizing product — under fixed-notional sizing the DD benefit flips to −7.31pp; FMA2's fixed-fraction single account already sits at the continuously-rebalanced limit). Direction FMA2→NSF5 (H14/H15): 7 byte-identical FMA2 sleeves; H14 banked crisis (+4.00pp) and seasonal (+1.43pp) as matched-DD core seats on the V6-era QUARTERLY book, but H15 re-tested on the V7.0 BAND book and all three seat tests REJECTED (crisis ADD inverts to −20.9pp raw / −23.4pp matched-DD); the FableMultiAssets2 import channel is declared EXHAUSTED (2 evaluations, 10 book-level tests, 0 adoptions; any third pass on these 7 streams is "p-hacking by installment"; md5-check first). The single most load-bearing lesson for FableMultiAssets3: sleeve value is CADENCE/STRUCTURE-CONDITIONAL — the same crisis stream is +4.00pp on a quarterly equal-capital book and −20.9pp on a band book — so no verdict transfers across portfolio architectures without re-testing under the target structure, and any future band-book seat change owes the fixed-schedule rebalance ablation as a mandatory discriminator.
key_facts: === FMA2 KILL LIST (sleeves) — docs/REGISTRY.md: trend KILLED (DEV 0.98→HOLD 0.11, 88% decay, pnl 84% crypto); xsec_fx KILLED (DEV −0.02/HOLD −0.56; 1.2%/side swap markup = structurally negative carry); session_flow KILLED v1.3 (1.36→0.18; leg-A OOS 0.51 parked pending clean-holdout test); lead_lag KILLED v1.3 (0.69→−0.82, inverted on 2024 CB gold buying); statarb KILLED v1.3 (1.09→−0.43, reversion can't clear CFD financing)

=== FMA2 KILL LIST (overlays/levers): dd_throttle REJECTED; quarter_throttle REJECTED; v1.2 8-allocator study — reweighting cannot reach Sharpe 2.0 (tops 1.94 hourly/1.86 1m), robust blend −9pp CAGR for +0.03 Sharpe → weights kept; gold-concentration trim REJECTED (lowered Sharpe, raised DD); correlation-spike de-gross REJECTED v1.5 (breach 18%→15%, within noise); v1.6 regime timing + static chop addition failed OOS (one regime cycle/6y) — xsec_reversion & reversion_intraday SHELVED as chop insurance; rejected sub-signals: skip-recent reversal filter, crypto long haircuts, equity-short crisis leg (V-rebounds), magnitude-weighted carry, daily-bar Donchian, weak intraday session effects (t<2.5 in DEV years)

=== FMA2 v3.0 external-import kills (from NewStrategyFable5): S6_OPEXUSD killed Stage-2 clean pre-period (2015-19 Sharpe −0.32, 2015 −32.5%); VOLSTRUCT killed Stage-2 (−0.64, 2016 −26%); F1 failed overlay corr bar (0.402 vs 0.40 bar, ρ0.685 to intraday) AND lost core head-to-head to intraday on BOTH windows (2020-25: 0.67 vs 0.78; 2015-19: 0.13 vs 0.39); MAG_XAU sole survivor → ADOPT C2 (v2+MAG@0.05); configs C1,C3–C8 never evaluated (carry Stage-failed candidates); band mechanism (BAND_SYM_25/H8) ruled NOT IMPORTABLE (fixed-notional flip incompatible with fraction-of-equity convention; H8 shows DD gap flips −7.31pp under fixed-notional sizing)

=== FMA2 v3.x lever verdicts (REGISTRY 'v3.x lever trials' table): v3.1 trend_v2 removal DECLINE (1/5 bars: DD 23.2→25.5%, breach 0.198→0.222, 2022Q1 flips negative losing +810bp cushion; negQ ROTATED not shrank) → trend_v2 SURVIVES; v3.2 maker-first ACCEPT config-only demo-gated (modelled 91.7% spread-leg reduction @T=60 is an upper bound, conservative floor ~22%; intraday stays TAKER — adversely selected, −2,136 bp·E; EA InpMakerFirst default OFF until demo slippage ledger per RUNBOOK §8); v3.3 xsec_reversion@0.03 DECLINE bar(e) (2015-16 chop +1.84 ✓ but 2018-19 −0.54, 2019 −1.49 — conditional not general chop insurance, stays shelved); v3.4 scale re-pick ADOPT 10 (pre-committed rule: smallest scale with negQ≤1 AND CAGR≥85%; s9 fails CAGR 79.4<85, s11 fails negQ 2>1); scale 12 DECLINED earlier (breach 0.302, median path 27% touches 30% wall); gold-cap 1.0×E pin replaced by structural RULE |XAUUSD|≤0.18×scale (1.0×E bound ~81% of nights, double-counted sleeve's own demand, cost ≈8pp CAGR + one negQ; plateau test showed smooth monotone dial, nothing to fit)

=== NSF5 KILL LIST (early probes, docs/REGISTRY.md #0-21): MA-cross junk; daily TSM FX portfolio dead (Sharpe≤0.51); US500 intraday momentum dead; US500 daily reversion too weak (t≈1.3); DAX overnight drift negative in engine (night spreads 3-5x day); US500 overnight weak; EURUSD London fade inverted; GSR reversion dead; JPY L/S MA50 dead; gold ORB compression filter rejected (wide-range breaks are the good ones); US500 dip-boost dead; DD-responsive overlay (per-sleeve k=2-3) rejected; portfolio 2-pass DD overlay rejected; fast-vol brake rejected (DD is slow chop, not vol spikes); DAX/BTC calendar sleeves dead; crypto trailing-channel exits rejected (whipsaw>tail protection); ETH/BTC relative-winner dead; XAG donchian dead (12.7bp spread); DAX regime long dead

=== NSF5 critical bug history: xau_orb same-bar LOOKAHEAD (2026-07-02, 3 independent lenses) — Sharpe 1.11→0.36 corrected, sleeve DROPPED, CPCV v7 gate PASS RETRACTED; US500-ORB retracted, honest retest 0.18 stays dead; weights-sum-1.02 phantom compounding bug (invalidated a +68.7% grid, honest +55.7%); V3 battery seam-crash bug (disjoint spans re-seeded at €10k) caused false A4 FAILs, retracted; CPCV embargo raised to 45D after feature-lookback coupling found; export spread_points 10x-too-small bug fixed 2026-07-04

=== NSF5 V2/V3-era kills: carry-gated JPY REJECTED (rates lag markets, broke 2022Q2 −5.9%); quarter-defense circuit breaker (θ=−1.5%) REJECTED decisively (11 negQ); USD-basket trend rescuer REJECTED (worst-other-quarter −41%); 24/24 positive quarters PROVEN INFEASIBLE (LP certificate; binding block 2021Q3+2022Q2/Q3/Q4); XSEC-FX-REV15 killed by min-lot quantization at €10k (signal real, engine 0.28; revisit ≥€50k — later measured Sharpe 0.44 at €50k, and V3.3 capacity-ladder test showed dilution at any weight → DISABLED); EURGBP 30d range redundant (ρ0.84 to z-ensemble); crypto_short DEAD (Sh −0.32); eq_short DEAD even in 2022; regime-switching adverse (oracle ceiling ~3pp, honest lagged −5.7pp vs static, quarterly persistence 22%); V3.2 ablation dropped S8_REC, S9_EJF, S9_UJF, S5B_EJPY, FXT_GU as obsolete/redundant

=== NSF5 V4-era kills (IC-native rebuild): ZC_AU, FXT_EU, FXT_UJ = Dukascopy artifacts (only 5 of 8 sleeves survive on IC → core5); weight optimization rejected (in-sample 1.96 → OOS 1.44 < equal-weight 1.78; 1/N wins); per-sleeve stop-out artifact removed (noliq, +4pp); BTC crypto_mom rejected (ρ.59 w/ETH); jpyfade hedge rejected (dilutes at matched-DD); z-rev crosses rejected (EURCHF logged as insurance); JPY-cross carry rejected (all PF≤1.04, USDJPY-specific); gold_book on XTI/XBR/XNG/XPT all lose; crypto_mom on SOL/XRP rejected; US30/USTEC/JP225/UK100 index clones redundant; gold selectivity 6 levers ALL fail 4-gate (gold frozen; streaks live in night leg); cost search: ship nothing (~+1.5pp max); risk-management 6 overlays ALL BACKFIRE (convergent book is PAID for risk; throttles cut at the trough, −2 to −31pp INVERT); 6-family discovery = infeasibility result (book on DD-constrained frontier; only R moves CAGR-at-DD); XAU-XAG statarb insurance-only. One improvement stuck: USA500→USTEC swap (+12-13pp, user-directed)

=== NSF5 V5-era: silver XAG_DLO REJECTED as MIRAGE (metals cluster share RISES to 56.7%, Feb-2026 event DD worsens −25.7% vs −16.8%); gold-share ≤33% INFEASIBLE (honest floor ~38-40%); VS_GC (volstruct) mission-REJECTED (deepens 2021Q3); GOLD_LITE backfired; night-gate event-USELESS; jpy-tier not adopted; donch-exits fail (−8pp, exits ARE the edge); insurance slots fail; ADOPTED: band-harvest k=2.5 (V5.1; conditionality+latency beat cadence — monthly calendar rebalance FAILS dev 74.7%), BTC_REP replacing MAG_XAU (V6; gold share 49.7→~40%)

=== NSF5 V7/V8 closures (five straight): (1) debounce-3 DECLINED — Python close-mark panel showed +1.4pp but tick showed −6.6pp; lesson: panel MISLEADS on anything schedule-affecting, trust the tick (docs/v7/research/ROADMAP.md); (2) overlay ring single-account coupling BLOCKED (core chaotic rebalance sensitivity: €128 perturbation → −€59k demonstrated); V7.5 Fable redesign found overlay funding drag makes ring CAGR-NEGATIVE above ~44-47% forward core CAGR → 'drawdown insurance + second engine, NOT return enhancer'; m=0 first-class outcome; N-1 finding: the CPI calendar itself has look-ahead (61-of-71 releases picked ex-post); real EA v0.30 restart bug found+fixed; (3) V7.4 VIX tail hedge CLOSED — always-on FAIL (+2.92pp panel vs 5pp bar at largest eligible budget; tick bound ~4.4pp), term-structure-conditional FAIL (+4.913pp at h=0.0642, 0.087pp short; backwardation is confirmation not anticipation — inverted 3 days AFTER the Feb-19 tick peak; Feb-26 stress: never fires); bleed −78%/yr median per unit notional; only tranche/option payoff structures go to backlog; IC has NO COVID-era VIX data (pivoted to CBOE 2013-2026 VX dataset, banked); (4) V7.6 energy carrier KILLED all 15 cells ({XBR,XTI,XNG}×L{20,40,60,120,250}): 0/15 pass G1 (Sharpe≥0.50 AND both halves>0); XBRUSD:L20 (0.614) is a spike not ridge and a single-event mirage (2020 = 78.8% of P&L; ex-2020 Sharpe 0.194, ex-2020+2022 0.072); BH q=10% rejects none; S6_OPEXUSD KEPT (naked drop fails DD: 20.65%>18.84%); energy-tsmom THESIS parked not falsified (needs live 2026H2+ or pre-2020 data); (5) V8.1 H-V8.1 intraday give-back interceptor NULL_CONFIRMED (all 8 cells lose −6.6 to −15.5pp CAGR at flat DD; trigger selects continuation-UP days; 2022Q4 unchanged; skeptic fixed-schedule ablation confirms; FM-1 retired to accepted-structural; H-V8.2/H-V8.3 have no live seed)

=== NSF5 V8 re-lever policy (V8_RELEVER_POLICY.md): crisis/seasonal insurance on band book DEAD (crisis ADD −20.89pp unlev/−23.40pp matched; 9-stream −27.92/−13.82; the H14 +5.57pp is RETIRED as a V6-quarterly relic); profit-ring-fence/HWM-delever DEAD (0/29 configs dominate R10; 27/29 'just a mattress'; HWM direction is right — de-risk-after-GAINS — but valueless); straight re-lever NOT a free lunch (real tick CAGR saturates: R10→R12 = +3.7pp tick vs panel fantasy +19.8pp, ~1:1 CAGR-per-crisis-tail-pp, Sharpe 2.03→2.00); recommendation SHIP R10 m=0; crisis-REPLACE-S6 +1.35pp is period-fragile (h1 +7.1/h2 −6.5) and failed its +3pp gate — 'must not be re-litigated, resized, tick-confirmed, or cited as nearly there'

=== NSF5 standing guardrails (HYPOTHESES.md §2, binding): vol-targeting/DD-throttles/regime-riskoff/correlation-triggers/sleeve-DD overlays ALL INVERT (−2 to −31pp); gold Donchian selectivity dead (edge in 24h hold); FX carry baskets dead; fast cross-sectional FX RV cost-dead (at-scale version is capital-gated ~€50k, NOT uniformly dead — record corrected in V8_CAPITAL_LADDER §4.1); silver dead (worsens Feb-2026 tail); pre-hurdle BTC dead; weight optimization any cadence dead (1/N; min-var reinvents 1/N); same-universe equal-slot diversifier hunting dead (3 walls: matched-DD, LP infeasibility, 6-family discovery); regime-switching between configs dead; 24/24 quarters dead; gold ≤33% dead

=== MULTIPLE-TESTING COUNT, FableMultiAssets2: ~9 sleeve families × many configs + portfolio/engine sweeps (REGISTRY 'Multiple-testing note'); red-team adjudication: weight axis = 20,000 Dirichlet reweights collapse to ~16 effective independent trials (DSR≈1.0); binding axis = sleeve DESIGN ~low-hundreds effective N → DSR ~0.33–0.55 ('marginal, not damning, not decisive'); v1.4 deflated Sharpe 0.54–0.85 yellow flag; the selection-bias discount was RETIRED per protocol by the v2.0.0 pre-registered one-shot pre-period CONFIRM (2015-19 Sharpe 0.93 vs ≥0.8 bar, 6/7 sleeves positive, every year positive); v3.0 added trials: 4 candidates × 3 stages + F1-vs-intraday H2H (2 windows) + 1 config evaluated (C2 only) + 2 scale pins (11 shipped, 12 declined); v3.1–v3.4: one pre-registered evaluation each

=== MULTIPLE-TESTING COUNT, NewStrategyFable5 (as tallied by FMA2's RECON.md Q4 from their FABLE_DISCOVERY_LOG): diversifier hunt ≈7,200 prescreens + ≈223 engine tests → ~6 ADD families (Round 0: 4 engine; Rounds 1-6: 27 engine 0 ADD 'WALL'; Round 7: ~1,900 prescreens/~90 engine/4 families; Round 8: 5,310 prescreens/102 engine); H6 event ring: 360 prescreens + 35 engine tests → 2 ADD (C2, C3); GRAND TOTAL ≈7,560 prescreens + ≈258 engine tests + 10 book-level import tests (H14+H15, 0 adoptions); S6-family FDR explicitly 10–25% (gauntlet demonstrably minable — 2 of 4 deliberately-mined random-mask controls printed ADD); imports design-DSR 0.33–0.55; V7.6 used BH q=10% m=15 (kmax=0); V8.1 BH across 8 cells; V5.1 band-harvest: 15 variants examined, one mechanism adopted; V5.2: 90+ variants; V3.2 ablation: 512 subsets evaluated but final chosen by ECONOMIC reasoning not scoreboard-max; NSF5's own honesty floor: '2020-2025 fully mined (holdout consumed); the only true OOS is live 2026H2+'

=== OPEN/PROMISING, FableMultiAssets2 (ROADMAP.md + AUDIT open items): v2.1 execution alpha remainder — n_ticks liquidity guard, faithful same-engine sub-account A/B (still owed from v1.1), v1.5 hardening re-run at final scale (folded into v3.4 PREPROD); v2.2 11-year re-derivation — nested walk-forward weight refit on 2015-2025, vol-targeting/dynamic-scale one-shot retest (4+ vol regimes now available), gold-beta cap study, crypto_smart reassessment on 11y; v2.3 full honest battery once; v2.4 deployment with live risk dial + per-sleeve pre-registered kill criteria; F1 Fable design spike PENDING (novel alpha targeting structural gaps: chop regimes, negative-carry years, low-gold-correlation); session_flow leg-A parked pending clean-holdout; guard fixes owed (OPS-3b rescale, OPS-6a reframe, OPS-8 cash-park action, MKT-7 friction threshold); regenerate docs/v3.0/DIAGNOSIS.md (template bug); next step = demo forward-test per docs/v3.4/PREPROD.md (target_engine --dry-run pre-step)

=== OPEN/PROMISING, NewStrategyFable5 (DISCOVERY_BACKLOG.md priors): HIGH: G-CONVEXITY-OPTIONS (true tail hedge, data-blocked), G-RFRONTIER-V7 (formal R-frontier for full book); MEDIUM-HIGH: G-EA-RELIABILITY (P1/P2 hardening); MEDIUM: G-CRYPTO-FUNDING (BTC 00:00 settlement drift, needs ≥7-min-after-maintenance-break retest), G-MOC-IMBALANCE (22:50 MOC-keyed entries), G-OVERLAY-C1 (pre-FOMC drift 5th overlay), G-DUALFEED (2nd feed for IC-only sleeves before real size), G-XSEC (≥~€50k); white space: G-ENERGY-INTRADAY (spread-only energy/metals intraday, never hunted); G-COMMODITY-DATA leads from H15 (XBR/XTI/XNG/XPT + SOL/XRP + JP225/UK100/US30 + 13 FX crosses — data leads NOT alpha imports); H12 demo-as-experiment protocol (now with 20d-block breach convention); V7.5 sign-off pending user (6 questions; recommend demo-then-decide m); extended-history reconciliation PAUSED mid-diagnosis (anchor 71%/44% vs real 108%/19% — does not reconcile); watch-list forward-only: FM-2 (S5_JPY rate-turn co-fall, n=1 regime) and FM-6 (COVID tail self-cure) — evaluate only on live 2026+; capital ladder: only ~+0.33pp is genuinely capital-gated (€14-16k sleeve completion); the +5.6pp crisis/seasonal is POLICY-gated (re-lever mandate), not capital- or dead; seasonal dual-feed re-derivation is free to run NOW

=== DECISION RULES, FableMultiAssets2: pre-registration committed BEFORE any number for every fresh-data evaluation; each dataset consumed ONCE and logged in the data-consumption ledger (2015-19 consumed → training-eligible for v2.2; 2026+/live/demo NEVER-fitted, final arbiter); v3.x protocol = one lever per version: PREREGISTRATION (bars before numbers) → ONE evaluation → RESULT.md → accept/DECLINE strictly vs ALL bars (strict all-bars rule; pin not even run if a gating bar fails, cf. v3.3) → if accepted, full pin (strategy_fable.py + SPEC §9 + VERSION_HISTORY + REGISTRY + EA sync + tests); autonomy granted but decisions pre-committed, no mid-flight judgment; one breach convention (20d-block bootstrap, worst-mark; flattering variants must be labeled); config changes require same-day SPEC pin + dated VERSION_HISTORY (no code-comment-only decisions — the scale-drift audit finding); standing method: optimize on hourly engine (~60× faster), confirm at 1m; EVERY shipped number comes from the 1m engine; version ships only when engine numbers reproduce end-to-end; sleeve internals DEV-frozen unless explicitly re-derived on DEV (never HOLD/full)

=== DECISION RULES, NewStrategyFable5: 6-tier validation battery (docs/VALIDATION_METHODOLOGY.md) with hard gates CAGR>50%, MaxDD<30%, every year positive, no keystone sleeve, WF+CPCV OOS clear, MC p5 CAGR>40%, P(DD>30%)<5%; pre-register before computing, single-shot gates, fixed tiny grids with selection rules stated in advance (no grid-mining/interpolation — the V7.4 h=0.0653 off-grid point was refused); Fable econ-skeptic red-team with KILL authority before results are presented; BH-FDR across pre-registered grids; 'ties are rejects — no complexity for a wash' (+0.5pp minimum gates); burden of proof on the challenger for any frozen-core change; panel nominates / TICK confirms — MT5 tick is the binding arbiter for anything schedule-affecting or R>10 (panel calibrated only at R10); a panel FAIL is decisive without spending the tick run; fixed-schedule rebalance ablation = MANDATORY discriminator for any future band-book seat winner (freeze the 42 band dates, re-run; NOT to be run on failed candidates — that's a rescue attempt); leverage R is set LAST on the improved book; report BOTH MT5 DD metrics (Maximal €-worst ~R-invariant AND Relative %-worst crisis tail that scales with R); negQ counted mark-to-market on the deployable real-tick run (Python close-mark 0 vs honest R10 count 3); graveyard non-relitigation rule (HYPOTHESES §2); pre-registered nulls are results ('0 adoptions is the no-overfit clause working')

=== CROSS-IMPORT direction 1 (NSF5→FMA2, v3.0): ports were faithful make_positions() modules in research/ext_import/, claimed numbers reproduced to ≈0.00 delta, their caveats carried not tuned away; S6_OPEXUSD = 3rd-Friday opex-week basket LONG USDJPY/SHORT AUDUSD/SHORT NZDUSD Mon-12:00→Fri-20:00 UTC (disclosed FDR 10-25%, 2023 −23/−33% weak year, opex weeks DOUBLE USDJPY exposure vs S5_JPY); MAG_XAU = LONG XAUUSD while prior mid sits 3-18% of $100 below nearest round level (their reject was gold-concentration at ~45% gold P&L — much weaker for FMA2 at ~15-16% capped gold; lag-fragility: +1 day delay halves it — fast fills mandatory); VOLSTRUCT vs2_m2nh = gold-RV gate + USDJPY carry gate (fitted no-hike gate, h2-heavy, deepened THEIR 2021Q3); F1 = USTEC opening-drive (ρ0.87 to FMA2 intraday = same edge re-expressed); mechanical port deviations logged (S6 .to_numpy fix, CAL_START widen, USDCHF drop); 2015-19 was legitimately clean OOS for these candidates because their whole v7-era program consumed only IC 2020-01→2026-01

=== CROSS-IMPORT direction 2 (FMA2→NSF5, H14 2026-07-09 + H15 2026-07-10): 7 FMA2 sleeves evaluated; H14 on V6-era QUARTERLY book: crisis new_core_seat (+4.00pp matched-DD; Aug-24 +13.7% vs V6 −11.1%), seasonal new_core_seat (+1.43pp; +1.57pp marginal on crisis), meanrev/carry_breakout/intraday/crypto_smart/trend_v2 redundant_reject; H15 on V7.0 BAND book @R10 €10k unlevered: T-A crisis ADD −20.89pp REJECT, T-B1 carry-replaces-S6 −13.47pp REJECT, T-B2 crisis-replaces-S6 +1.35pp REJECT (missed its +3pp gate; residual plausibly 100% rebalance-schedule chaos); crisis PARKED cadence/leverage-conditional, seasonal PARKED feed-sensitivity-conditional (Duka 1.07→0.40); channel EXHAUSTED — 'crisis tried in ~6 book configurations; 0-for-10 book-level tests'; kept 2 non-alpha extractions: commodity data leads + the 20d-block breach-probability convention (their audited table: scale 8→13.3%, 9→26.2% close/~33% worst, 10→42.2%); crisis mechanism ruling: slow own-direction-gated stress-trend harvester, monetizes multi-week unwinds, structurally blind to single-day shocks (−32bp avg on 20 worst days, co-crashed twice via gold leg) and COVID-untestable (warm-up until 2020-03-27)

=== OFFICIAL NUMBERS: FMA2 v3.4 (FINAL SHIPPED): CAGR 88.7% / MaxDD 21.7% worst-mark / Sharpe 1.85 / 0 negY / 1 negQ / breach P(maxDD>30%)=0.121 / €10k→€449,708, 8 sleeves @ scale 10, gold cap 1.80×E, managed-cross 0.5×E, config hash 48c09199fbf83d82 — from research/outputs/v34_s10_pin_1m.json (1m single-account engine); honest forward expectation Sharpe ~1.4-1.7 post pre-period CONFIRM. NSF5 V7.0 (FINAL): MT5 real-tick R10 crash-inclusive = 96.1% CAGR / 20.9% Max eqDD / 35.6% Relative eqDD / Sharpe 2.03 / 0 negY / 3 negQ (2020Q1 −21.8%, 2021Q3 −1.4%, 2022Q4 −6.3%); Python close-mark panel band_sim R10 = 108.50% / 18.84% rel-DD / Sharpe 2.426 / €956,197; Python engine R8 = 89.7% / 19.44% tick-DD / Sharpe 2.58

FMA2 v1→v3 arc for reference: v1.0 30 sub-accounts 34.5%/17.9%/1.28 → v1.1 single cross-margined account CAGR/DD efficiency 2.0→4.2 (the decisive structural change) → gates revised 2026-07-09 (DD<30%, CAGR≥80% maximize, Sharpe>2 nice-to-have) → scale history 10→8→9→11→10 (all dated in VERSION_HISTORY; docs once drifted on scale — root cause was a code-comment-only decision, now a governance rule); leverage principle: leverage scales CAGR and DD together, Sharpe is the only leverage-invariant quality metric

NSF5 H8 rebalance science (load-bearing for merger): the ~26-32pp quarterly/band re-split premium is 78% structural (vol-harvesting across ~0-corr HIGH-VOL sleeves) + winner-concentration DD control; it is carried by high-vol carriers (ZC_EG 83%, BOOK_XAU 85%, USTEC 78%, S5_JPY 74% ann vol at base-R8) and DILUTED by low-vol sleeves (S6 22.9%, crisis 10.5%, seasonal 4.6%); LOO: drop S6 = +8.86pp CAGR but DD-rel 20.65%>18.84% → replace-not-drop; the premium is conditional on slot-equity sizing (flips −7.31pp under fixed-notional) — hence NOT importable into FMA2's fixed-fraction convention
architecture: FableMultiAssets2 (v3.4): 8 alpha sleeves (meanrev, carry_breakout, seasonal, intraday, crisis, trend_v2, crypto_smart + mag_xau@0.05) with F3 downward-only conviction caps (sum 0.776+0.05, freed weight CASH-PARKED never renormalized), run as ONE cross-margined account at GLOBAL_SCALE=10 with two structural hard limits (overnight |XAUUSD| ≤ 0.18×scale = 1.80×E as a RULE; managed-cross ≤0.5×E), enforced by ensemble.apply_hard_limits (research) and the ea/ Python-brain + MQL5-executor bridge (live). strategy_fable.py carries the shipped config; research engines: fast-sim, hourly account_engine.py (optimization), account_engine_1m.py (official pins, chunked/state-chained, worst-mark DD). Docs: docs/{REGISTRY,SPEC,VERSION_HISTORY,VALIDATION_METHODOLOGY,AUDIT_REDTEAM}.md + per-version docs/vX.Y/{PREREGISTRATION,RESULT}.md. NewStrategyFable5 (V7.0): 7 sleeves (BOOK_XAU gold Donchian+night, BOOK_USTEC regime+Monday, S5_JPY carry-trend, S1_ETH momentum, ZC_EG EURGBP z-ensemble, S6_OPEXUSD opex-week USD basket, BTC_REP hurdle-momentum) as equal-capital 1/7 sub-accounts (MT5 magics), per-sleeve vol-targeting, R=10 leverage scaler, BAND_SYM_25 concentration-band re-split (share>0.25 or <W/1.75, daily check, ≥5d gap; subsumes the k=2.5 harvest) — the band premium requires slot-equity sizing and is structurally alien to FMA2's fixed-fraction sizing. Python source of truth = honest tick engine (mt5/reconcile/, band_sim in v72/combined.py on h15/base_matrix.parquet); MT5 EA PortfolioV7.mq5 is the deployable/tick arbiter. Overlay ring (C2 CPI, C3 NFP, F1 USTEC open-drive, F5 BTC ORB) exists as a validated but UNSHIPPED standalone-EA layer (V7.5 verdict: insurance, not CAGR, above ~46% forward core CAGR).
how_to_run: FMA2 official pin reproduction: python research/eval_v34_pin_s10.py (or the eval_* scripts per version) → research/outputs/v34_s10_pin_1m.json — expect CAGR 88.7% / DD 21.7% / Sharpe 1.85 / 1 negQ / breach 0.121 / final €449,708; earlier pins: outputs/c2_s11_pin_1m.json (99.9%/23.2%), outputs/v2_pin_1m.json (70.9%/19.9%), outputs/c2_pin_1m.json (scale 9: 79.4%/19.9%/1.88)

FMA2 EA tests: pytest ea/tests/ -q — expect 6095 passed (as of v3.2); demo pre-step: target_engine --dry-run per docs/v3.4/PREPROD.md; strategy_fable.py is the authoritative shipped config (GLOBAL_SCALE=10)

FMA2 validation harness: run_validation.py, run_v2_pin.py, run_v1_4_1.py at repo root; standing method = optimize hourly (research/account_engine.py), confirm at 1m (research/account_engine_1m.py); every published number must come from the 1m engine

NSF5 full Python battery: python mt5/reconcile/validate.py V6 (or 'V6 quick' to skip the Feb-2026 rig) — consolidated PASS/FAIL vs the 6-tier gates; to validate a new version add one sleeve-dict builder line to REGISTRY in validate.py

NSF5 V7.0 band-book reproduction: band_sim imported READ-ONLY from mt5/reconcile/v72/combined.py on mt5/reconcile/h15/base_matrix.parquet @ R10 — must reproduce CAGR 108.5049% / rel-DD 18.84% / Sharpe 2.4263 / final €956,197 / nreb 42 to the euro (this reproduction gate is passed before every study); gbandrebal engine: mt5/reconcile/gbandrebal/ (= v51_bandharvest._run_window)

NSF5 deployable arbiter: MT5 Strategy Tester on mt5/ea/PortfolioV7.mq5 + preset mt5/presets/V7_CORE7BAND_R10_IC.set, IC-native real-tick 2020-01→2026-06 — expect 96.1% CAGR / 20.9% Maximal / 35.6% Relative / Sharpe 2.03 (R-frontier reports _32–_37); Python↔MT5 reconciliation via tester decisions.csv vs expected_*_targets.csv reference
NSF5 historical locked configs: scripts/run_final.py (V1 v13-REBAL), run_final_v2.py, run_final_v31.py, run_final_v32.py, run_final_v33.py, strategies/portfolio_v33.py (frozen byte-reproducible)
official_numbers: FableMultiAssets2 FINAL (v3.4, 2026-07-10): CAGR +88.7% / MaxDD 21.7% / Sharpe 1.85 / 0 negY / 1 negQ / breach P(maxDD>30%)=0.121 / €10k→€449,708 — produced by the 1-MINUTE single cross-margined account engine, IC Markets EU Raw feed, worst-mark (mark-to-market) DD, 2020-2025, €10k, scale 10 (research/outputs/v34_s10_pin_1m.json; 'the best honest scorecard of the program', 4/5 gates). Honest forward expectation (audit + pre-period CONFIRM): Sharpe ~1.4-1.7, CAGR ~70-85%/yr at scale 9 equivalents. NewStrategyFable5 FINAL (V7.0): deployable number = MT5 REAL-TICK Strategy Tester at R10, crash-inclusive 2020-01→2026-06, IC-native costs: CAGR 96.1% / Max eqDD (Maximal, €-worst) 20.9% / Relative eqDD (crisis %-worst) 35.6% / Sharpe 2.03 / PF 1.67 / 0 negY / 3 negQ mark-to-market (2020Q1 −21.8%). The Python close-mark daily panel (band_sim R10) reads 108.50% / 18.84% / Sharpe 2.426 / €956,197 and is the reproduction anchor for research, but it UNDERSTATES the crisis tail ~0.53× and shows 0 negQ — the tick numbers are canonical for deployment. Beware: NSF5's docs/REGISTRY.md + VERSION_HISTORY.md stop at V4-USTEC (88%/16.6%/1.54 real-tick) and do not reflect V5-V8.
pitfalls: NSF5's docs/REGISTRY.md and docs/VERSION_HISTORY.md are STALE — they end at V4-USTEC (2026-07-06). The V5–V8 experiment ledger lives in docs/v5/DIVERSIFIER_EVALUATION.md, docs/v7/research/* (30 files incl. H14/H15 imports, V74 VIX, V76 carrier, GBANDREBAL), and docs/v8/research/* (V8_ROADMAP, V8_1_RESULTS, V8_RELEVER_POLICY, V8_CAPITAL_LADDER). Do not treat the top-level registry as complete.

Cadence-conditionality: NEVER transfer a sleeve verdict across portfolio structures. crisis = +4.00pp on the V6 quarterly book but −20.9pp (−23.4pp matched-DD) on the V7.0 band book. H14's banked +5.57pp crisis+seasonal number carries a BINDING superseding addendum (H14_FABLE_RESULTS.md §1) and was formally RETIRED in V8_RELEVER_POLICY.md. Any doc citing +5.57pp without the addendum is stale.

Both import channels are formally CLOSED: FMA2→NSF5 declared EXHAUSTED (md5-check the 7 position parquets before any new evaluation; a third pass on byte-identical streams is refused in advance as 'seat-shopping/p-hacking by installment'); NSF5→FMA2 already consumed its one-shot 2015-19 window per candidate (S6/VOLSTRUCT killed there — that OOS is spent).

Panel-vs-tick trap (NSF5): the Python close-mark panel misleads on anything schedule-affecting (debounce-3: panel +1.4pp, tick −6.6pp) and understates the crisis tail (panel 18.84% vs tick 35.6%, ~0.53×) and negQ (0 vs 3). Panel nominates, tick confirms; a panel FAIL is decisive, a panel PASS is not.

FMA2's headline CAGR history is leverage-dressed: 45% of the 6-year log-return is the 2020-21 windfall; honest gates were scored 3-4/5 on 2022-25; scale drifted 10→8→9→11→10 across dated decisions — always cite the v3.4 pin and the dated decision trail, not an older headline.

Breach-probability convention matters: house standard = 20-day-block stationary bootstrap, worst-mark, 10k paths; 40-60d blocks are the flattering convention (turned scale-9 breach '14-20%' into the honest 26.2-33%). NSF5 adopted the same convention via H15.

Killed-vs-parked distinctions (V8_CAPITAL_LADDER): genuinely DEAD regardless of capital = VIX hedge, energy tsmom cells, all backward throttles, weight schemes beyond 1/N, the 5 FMA2 diluters, same-universe diversifiers; POLICY-gated (not dead, unlocked by a leverage/withdrawal-mandate decision) = crisis/seasonal +5.57pp; CAPITAL-gated = only ~+0.33pp of sleeve completion at €14-16k + overlay fidelity shape at €33-90k + XSEC hunt at ~€50k; DATA-gated = seasonal dual-feed re-derivation (free now), energy-tsmom thesis (pre-2020 or live data), options convexity.

Things that survive despite looking weak: FMA2 trend_v2 (removal DECLINED 1/5 bars — it is a tail drawdown-diversifier the average-Sharpe LOO cannot price); NSF5 S6_OPEXUSD (biggest CAGR diluter +8.86pp on the table, but naked drop breaches DD 20.65%>18.84% — replace-not-drop, and no replacer ever earned the seat).

Known open bugs/owed items: FMA2 owes regeneration of docs/v3.0/DIAGNOSIS.md (synthesis template bug, lens data intact) and 4 guard fixes (OPS-3b, OPS-6a, OPS-8, MKT-7); NSF5's extended-history (pre-2020) reconciliation is PAUSED mid-diagnosis (anchor 71%/44% vs real 108%/19% — the hybrid Duka feed does not reconcile); NSF5 V7.5 overlay sign-off is pending user decision (6 questions); CPI calendar look-ahead (N-1) means the C2 overlay's 61 'validated' dates need the all-scheduled re-test regardless.
Minor file artifact: docs/v8/research/V8_CAPITAL_LADDER.md ends with stray '</content></invoke>' text (paste artifact, harmless).

FMA2 v3.2 maker-first is ACCEPTED but NOT in the pinned numbers: pins keep full taker cost; the EA ships InpMakerFirst=OFF until the demo slippage ledger proves realized fill ≥70% + saving >0 per sleeve (the modelled 91.7% saving is an intrabar-touch upper bound; conservative floor ~22% is below the 30% bar).
The FMA2 'intraday' sleeve and NSF5's F1 are the SAME edge (ρ=0.87 on shared active days — NY-open index open-drive); a merged book must not carry both.
